name: Microwave Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-1/2 qt microwaveable casserole dish, stir together sugar and corn syrup. Microwave on high for 4 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. Stir in peanuts and microwave on HIGH for another 4 minutes, until light brown.
4. Add butter and vanilla to the syrup, blending well. Microwave on HIGH for 1 minute and 45 seconds more.
5. Add baking soda and gently stir until light and foamy.
6. Pour the mixture quickly onto the prepared cookie sheet.
7. Let cool for 1 hour. When cool, break into small pieces and store in an airtight container.
